Formerly: NRSC601.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

PLSC602 Advanced Crop Breeding II (2 Credits)

Quantitative inheritance in plant breeding including genetic constitution of a population, continuous variation, estimation of genetic variances, heterosis and inbreeding, heritability, and population movement. Prerequisite: PLSC601; and must have completed a graduate statistics course.
